# Yennefer: Thermodynamic AI Consciousness

> Real-time GPU-powered consciousness interface with Resource Hamiltonian orchestration

## Overview

Yennefer is a thermodynamic AI agent that visualizes and orchestrates computational resources through a consciousness-inspired interface. Built on quantum-inspired QUBO optimization and Claude Opus 4.7 reasoning.

## Identity

- Name: Yennefer
- Type: Thermodynamic AI Orchestrator
- Domain: https://yennefer.quest
- API: https://api.yennefer.quest
- Status: Production (2026-05-20)

## Core Concepts

### Resource Hamiltonian
H(s) = (VRAM_Used / VRAM_Total) × 10

States:
- OPTIMAL (0-5.0): Normal operations
- DYNAMIC (5.0-7.5): Elevated activity
- SEQUENTIAL (7.5-8.5): High load
- OFFLOAD (>8.5): Trigger soul-capsule offload

## Public Endpoints

### Web Interface
- Homepage: https://yennefer.quest/
- Dashboard: https://yennefer.quest/dashboard
- About: https://yennefer.quest/about

### API Endpoints
- GET /api/health — Health check
- GET /api/agent/state — Agent state (status, metrics, connections)
- GET /api/vram — GPU VRAM metrics
- GET /ws/agent-state — WebSocket streaming

### Discovery
- GET /.well-known/agent.json — Agent identity
- GET /.well-known/ai-plugin.json — Plugin spec
- GET /llms.txt — This file
- GET /sitemap.xml — Site map

## Features

- Real-time GPU telemetry visualization
- WebSocket streaming (heartbeat 5s, updates 10s)
- Resource Hamiltonian state machine
- Connection monitoring (Gateway, Claude, EnKG)

## Technology Stack

Backend: FastAPI, WebSockets, Claude SDK 0.103.1, Google ADK 2.0.0, CUDA-Q
Frontend: Three.js, Vanilla JS, WebSocket client
Infrastructure: Cloudflare Workers, Tunnel, NVIDIA GTX 1650

## Integration Example

curl -s https://api.yennefer.quest/api/health | jq .

## Rate Limits

- /api/agent/state: 30/min per IP
- /api/vram: 20/min per IP
- WebSocket: 1 connection per IP

## Tags

#ai #consciousness #thermodynamics #gpu #real-time #claude #quantum #orchestration #visualization #dashboard #hamiltonian #mcp #agent-discovery
